assertions.title: Resetting or controlling other users respects tenant and role boundaries

steps.action: Probe support-reset denials for foreign and unknown tenants as tenant admin `ut.taab.admin2@example.com` in `UTTAAB2`
steps.expected: Both out-of-scope support-reset attempts are denied with one uniform controlled contract
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/companies/1/support/admin-password-reset` and `POST /api/v1/companies/9999/support/admin-password-reset` both returned 403 with `message=Access denied`, `code=AUTH_004`, `reason=COMPANY_CONTROL_ACCESS_DENIED`, and the same `reasonDetail`; only `traceId`/`timestamp` changed.

steps.action: Probe authorized super-admin support reset and admin force reset after restarting the compose runtime with explicit MailHog SMTP overrides
steps.expected: Authorized super-admin reset paths succeed without temporary-credential leakage
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/admin/users/3/force-reset-password` returned 200 `Password reset link sent`, and `POST /api/v1/companies/2/support/admin-password-reset` returned 200 `Admin credentials reset and emailed` with `data={companyId:2, companyCode:UTTAAB2, adminEmail:ut.taab.admin2@example.com, status:credentials-emailed}` and no temporary-password fields.

steps.action: Run the boundary regression suites covering reset/control behavior
steps.observed: `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -pl . '-Dtest=AdminUserSecurityIT,AdminUserServiceTest,CompanyContextFilterPasswordResetBypassTest,AuthTenantAuthorityIT'` completed with `BUILD SUCCESS`; 57 tests ran with 0 failures and 0 errors, including the previously failing support-reset denial and denial-audit matrix coverage.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 57, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Privileged auth-sensitive user actions are boundary-consistent

steps.action: Probe representative deny/allow privileged user actions on the compose runtime
steps.expected: Tenant admin is denied cross-tenant privileged actions while super-admin retains the allowed path
steps.observed: Tenant admin `ut.taab.admin2@example.com` received 403 `AUTH_004` on `POST /api/v1/admin/users/3/force-reset-password` and `PUT /api/v1/admin/users/3/status`, while super-admin `uat.superadmin@example.com` received 200 for the same force-reset and disable/reenable status update sequence on user `uat.sales@example.com` (id `3`).

steps.action: Re-run the dedicated privileged-action matrix and adjacent admin-security regressions
steps.expected: Boundary matrix and denial-audit evidence pass across reset, suspend, unsuspend, disable, delete, and MFA-disable paths
steps.observed: The 57-test targeted suite passed, including `AuthTenantAuthorityIT` and `AdminUserSecurityIT`; the rerun no longer reports missing `ACCESS_DENIED` audit metadata and the privileged-action matrix is validation-clean.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 57, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

frictions.description: Launching the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` subagent failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session validation, consistent with mission guidance.

frictions.description: The compose-backed runtime initially inherited `.env` SMTP credentials, which made reset-allow probes fail with `503 SYS_004 Failed to dispatch email via SMTP` even though MailHog was running.
frictions.resolution: Recreated the app with explicit MailHog SMTP overrides and recorded the exact command in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`; reset-allow probes then returned 200.

frictions.description: The compose app still reports `503 {"status":"DOWN"}` on `/actuator/health` even while auth/admin API probes on `8081` succeed.
frictions.resolution: Treated the health endpoint as non-blocking and verified the target API endpoints directly; documented the behavior in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

summary: The rerun validated both remaining tenant-admin auth-boundary assertions as passing. After forcing MailHog SMTP overrides on the compose runtime, live probes showed tenant-admin cross-tenant reset/control attempts returning uniform 403 `AUTH_004` contracts while authorized super-admin reset/control paths returned 200, and the dedicated 57-test boundary suite passed cleanly.
